no_changes_rationale:
No code changes produced — bead acceptance criteria are already satisfied at base-rev (40163917).

CONTEXT
The bead notes carry a REVIEW:BLOCK from a prior re-queue attempt asserting that
"the actual implementation commit (19b3008b) introducing group-by control,
grouping.ts, and urlState.ts is not present in the changed files." That assertion
is incorrect for the current base-rev. Verification:

  $ git merge-base HEAD 19b3008b
  19b3008b1b9bc712bc3834adcac7f79e4006d5f7
  $ git show --stat 19b3008b
  feat(web): group-by control + grouping.ts + urlState.ts shared helper [ddx-345226c9]
   cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/urlState.test.ts             | +71
   cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/urlState.ts                  | +82
   .../nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.svelte    | +176/-58
   .../nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.ts        | +9/-2
   .../nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/grouping.test.ts| +80
   .../nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/grouping.ts     | +80

The implementation merge (816752ef) landed cleanly on 2026-05-02 and is in HEAD.

ACCEPTANCE-CRITERIA WALKTHROUGH (all met at HEAD)

AC1  Group-by dropdown visible; default Folder.
     +page.svelte:197-209 renders a labelled <select> with options Folder /
     Prefix / Media type. Default is wired through DEFAULT_GROUP_BY in
     urlState.ts:18 ('folder') and parseGroupBy at urlState.ts:20-23.

AC2  grouping.ts exports prefixOf, folderOf, workflowStageOf with regex-based
     derivation.
     grouping.ts:8  FOLDER_RE and folderOf
     grouping.ts:17 PREFIX_RE and prefixOf
     grouping.ts:26 STAGE_RE and workflowStageOf
     Plus axisAvailable() at grouping.ts:34 and groupItems/groupKey helpers.

AC3  urlState.ts is the single source of truth for URL state.
     urlState.ts:25 readState(), urlState.ts:41 writeState() handle q,
     mediaType, groupBy, sort and filter.* keys; the writer preserves
     unrelated keys (including ?back=) by initialising
     `new URLSearchParams(params)` at line 45 and only mutating known keys.
     +page.svelte imports writeState (line 8) for both onSearchInput,
     selectGroupBy, selectMediaType, and openArtifact (back-href construction).

AC4  ARIA roles for group headers.
     +page.svelte:239 sets role="rowgroup" on the <tbody> with an
     aria-label of "<GroupBy label>: <key>"; +page.svelte:241-249 renders a
     <th colspan="5" scope="rowgroup" role="rowheader"> for the group
     header row.

AC5  sessionStorage persistence with stable keys.
     +page.svelte:30-31 derives stable keys
       artifacts:groupBy:<projectId>
       artifacts:mediaType:<projectId>
     and the $effect at lines 33-42 writes them on every change, with a
     try/catch fallback for SSR / private mode.

AC6  cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun test passes.
     The bead-scoped tests pass:

       $ bun test src/lib/urlState.test.ts \
                 'src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/grouping.test.ts'
       23 pass / 0 fail / 40 expect() calls

     The full `bun test` suite has unrelated failures in the repo right now
     (graphql-ws missing import in src/lib/gql/subscriptions.ts;
      TypedConfirmDialog export mismatch in primitives.smoke.spec.ts;
      D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts edge stroke-opacity assertion).
     None of those touch grouping.ts, urlState.ts, or the artifacts list page,
     and they all reproduce on the pre-bead checkpoint commit (40163917) — i.e.
     they are pre-existing failures owned by other beads, not regressions
     introduced by this bead.

CONCLUSION
Nothing to commit. The work the bead asks for is already merged and verifiable
at HEAD. Re-merging or re-introducing the same files would either be a no-op or
a duplicate-content collision. If the next review still BLOCKs, the reviewer
should be pointed at commit 19b3008b directly rather than at the empty diff
between base-rev (40163917) and this attempt.
